backend/main.mo: Main actor defining user profiles, restaurant/menu/order types, CRUD operations for restaurants and orders, cart calculations, and access control integration with authorization and blob storage mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module converting old restaurant/menu/order data structures to new versions with added fields (address, category, available, imageUrl) for schema evolution.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four implemented features: restaurant registration form, address display in RestaurantCard, menu item images in MenuItemCard, and menu item management interface.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Summaries of frontend files including routing, authentication, cart management, restaurant/menu/order hooks, layout components, and page components with warm food-themed styling.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind layers defining OKLCH color variables for light and dark themes using warm, food-themed neutral tones.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script reference to main.tsx for the FoodHub Demo application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root app component configuring TanStack Router with routes for restaurants, menu, orders, restaurant registration, and menu management, wrapped in theme/auth/cart providers.
Floating cart button with item count badge that opens a sheet drawer containing the cart, hidden when cart is empty.
Cart drawer sheet displaying empty state or scrollable cart items list with header, cart summary, and checkout button.
frontend/src/components/cart/CartItem.ts: Displays a single cart item with quantity controls (plus/minus buttons), remove button, and calculates the item total price. Uses CartContext to update quantities and remove items.
frontend/src/components/cart/CartSummary: Shows cart pricing breakdown including subtotal, platform fee, delivery charges, and total. Converts prices from cents to rupees for display.
frontend/src/components/cart/CheckoutBut: Handles checkout flow by checking authentication, placing orders via mutation, clearing cart on success, and navigating to order confirmation. Shows appropriate button text based on auth state.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Renders application footer with copyright notice and attribution link to caffeine.ai with UTM tracking parameters.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Main navigation header with FoodHub branding, authentication controls (sign in/out), and dropdown menu for orders and restaurant registration. Shows user principal when authenticated.
frontend/src/components/layout/Layout.ts: Root layout component that wraps the app with Header, Footer, CartButton, and initializes sample data on mount. Uses Outlet for nested routes.
frontend/src/components/menu/MenuCategor: Groups and displays menu items by food type category (veg, non-veg, beverages, etc.) with labeled sections and grid layout for menu item cards.
frontend/src/components/menu/MenuFilters: Provides filtering UI with category badges (veg, non-veg, beverages, etc.) and a toggle switch to show only available items.
frontend/src/components/menu/MenuItemCar: Displays individual menu item with image, name, description, price, prep time, food type icon, and quantity selector. Handles adding items to cart with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/menu/MenuItemUpl: Image upload component for menu items that accepts image URLs, shows preview with error handling, and provides clear/remove functionality.
frontend/src/components/orders/OrderCard: Displays order details including order ID, timestamp, restaurant name, items list with quantities, total price, and status badge with color coding. Includes OrderStatusIndicator component.
frontend/src/components/orders/OrderStat: Displays a visual stepper showing order progress through four stages (confirmed, preparing, out for delivery, delivered) with icons and connecting lines.
frontend/src/components/restaurants/Rest: Renders a clickable card for a restaurant showing its logo, cuisine type, address, opening hours, and average prep time with hover effects.
frontend/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx: Provides authentication context wrapping Internet Identity, exposing login/logout functions and authentication state to child components.
frontend/src/contexts/CartContext.tsx: Manages shopping cart state with localStorage persistence, handles adding/removing items, quantity updates, and prevents mixing items from different restaurants.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages the backend actor instance with authentication, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication integration with React context, managing login flow, identity persistence, and authentication status.
frontend/src/hooks/useMenu.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching restaurant menus and adding menu items with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useMenuFilters.ts: Manages menu filtering state by food category and availability with memoized filtered results.
frontend/src/hooks/useOrders.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching order history, individual orders (with polling), and placing new orders.
frontend/src/hooks/useRestaurants.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching restaurants, initializing sample data, and registering new restaurants.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with a warm food-themed color palette for both light and dark modes using CSS custom properties.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility function combining clsx and tailwind-merge for conditional CSS class name composition.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point setting up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and rendering the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/ManageMenuPage.tsx: Page for restaurant owners to add menu items with form validation, image upload, and fields for name, description, price, category, food type, prep time, and availability.
frontend/src/pages/MenuPage.tsx: Displays a restaurant's menu with filtering by category and availability, showing menu items organized by category sections with back navigation to restaurants list.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmationPage: Shows order confirmation details after successful order placement, including order status, items, total price, estimated preparation time, and navigation options.
frontend/src/pages/OrderHistoryPage.tsx: Displays authenticated user's past orders sorted by timestamp, with authentication guard and empty state handling.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterRestaurantPag: Form page for authenticated users to register a new restaurant with details like name, address, cuisine type, opening hours, and average prep time.
frontend/src/pages/RestaurantsPage.tsx: Home page displaying a hero banner and grid of available restaurants with loading skeletons and empty state handling.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system with CSS variables, custom fonts (Inter, Poppins), border radius variables, custom shadows, and animations for accordions and fade-in effects. Includes typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for a web-based food ordering demo built with Motoko backend and React frontend, using Internet Identity authentication. Documents architectural constraints (no native apps, GPS, SMS, payment gateways), existing features (authentication, restaurant listings, menu browsing, cart system, order management), and image requirements.
